title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a Pakistani digital creator trying to sell courses without relying on Stripe, you're not alone. Many platforms like PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip have restrictions that block creators from certain countries. In this post, we'll explore the harsh realities of these restrictions and show you a viable alternative that bypasses these limitations altogether. We'll examine the options, their benefits, and drawbacks, and ultimately, help you make an informed decision about which platform to use for your digital business. For creators stuck with limited payment options, this post is a lifeline.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for creators to sell digital products, but their global reach is limited due to strict regulations and country restrictions. PayPal, for instance, only allows businesses in over 200 countries and territories to send and receive payments, but this excludes many countries, including Pakistan. Meanwhile, Gumroad's restrictions block creators from using their platform if they're based in certain countries, while Payhip doesn't support some countries at all. Stripe, on the other hand, has limited support for certain countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and others. However, a new wave of crypto-native platforms has emerged to fill this gap, offering seamless and secure payment processing without the need for traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

These traditional payment processors have strict Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations, which often block creators from restricted countries. KYC requirements can be a significant hurdle for many digital creators, especially those from countries with limited banking infrastructure. In contrast, crypto-native platforms offer an easy way out of this problem by utilizing blockchain technology and cryptocurrencies, which are not bound by the same restrictions. With NOWPayments as the payment processor, you can bypass KYC requirements and start selling digital products in minutes, without worrying about geographical restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors often charge high transaction fees, which can eat into your earnings. Stripe, for instance, charges a base fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, while PayPal charges between 2.9% + $0.30 and 4.4% + $0.30 per transaction. Crypto-native platforms, on the other hand, offer faster and cheaper payment processing, with transaction fees ranging from 0.5% to 1.5%. Moreover, with NOWPayments, you can enjoy instant automated delivery and secure payment processing, with no need to worry about complex payment flows.
Crypto-native platforms can save creators thousands of dollars in transaction fees each year.

Crypto-native platforms offer a range of automation tools and delivery capabilities, making it easy to manage your digital business. With the Full Stack Bundle, you get everything you need to run a seamless digital store, including Core Shop Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. This comprehensive solution includes automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to sell and deliver digital products without manual intervention.
